---
title: "test_odin_rng.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_odin_rng.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.80
style_score: 4.14
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.81
---

## Intent
The `test_odin_rng.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_tactical_rng_bounds, test_tactical_rng_choice. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_tactical_rng_bounds, test_tactical_rng_choice. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng)

### Exports
- `test_tactical_rng_bounds`
- `test_tactical_rng_choice`
